dct_title_s: Evolução da divisão territorial do Brasil 1872 - 2010 : conteúdo digital
dct_alternative_sm: Evolution of territorial divisions of Brazil 1872 - 2010
dct_description_sm: This collection of GIS data layers is the result of a review of political and administrative data contained in the Evolution of territorial divisions of Brazil project, published by IBGE in 2011. (http://www.ibge.gov.br/home/geociencias/geografia/default_evolucao.shtm). All layers are in shapefile format (polygons and points) representing the evolution of Brazilian states, municipalities and cities.
System requirements: Geographic Information Systems (GIS) software that reads ESRI shapefile format.
dct_rights_sm: This item is in the public domain.  There are no restrictions on use.
dct_rightsHolder_sm: This work is in the Public Domain, meaning that it is not subject to copyright.
